summary: Iteration 2 of sprint-7 adversarial review. All 13 iter-1 findings (FIND-058..070) — 3 critical + 7 major + 3 minor — are resolved in production source per evidence (sprint-7-green-phase-iter-2.log, sprint-7-test-fixes-iter-2.log, sprint-7-cleanup-iter-3.log) and verified by direct file inspection: the off-screen ghost block in EditorPanel.svelte is gone, isNewNoteDisabled is `viewState.status === 'switching'` only, isCopyEnabled is `canCopy(viewState)` only (no isDirty gate), the dual-dispatch Enter handler is gone, the always-rendered hidden block-validation-hint elements are replaced by conditional rendering driven by `currentBlockError` $state populated via Promise rejection wrapping (RD-022), DTO `blocks` field plus reducer mirroring (RD-021) replaces the focusedBlockId synthesis path, the EC-EDIT-014 test now simulates the post-Cancel editing snapshot and asserts `document.activeElement?.getAttribute('data-block-id')`, and SaveFailureBanner data-shadow-applied/data-accent-color attributes are gone (className + source-grep verification). RD-021 and RD-022 are coherently documented in behavioral-spec.md §9 and §10. Per cleanup-iter-3 evidence, `bun run test:dom` reports 216 passed (216) and editor-scope tsc errors=0. Two new minor findings (FIND-071 residual block-synthesis fallback in EditorPanel, FIND-072 PROP-EDIT-024a test does not drive the full saving→editing transition) are recorded for cleanup but do not block strict-mode dimension PASS (dimension PASS requires zero critical AND zero major). Phase 5 may proceed.

evidence.description: FIND-059 fixed: isCopyEnabled = $derived(canCopy(viewState)) — no isDirty gate
FIND-058 fixed: isNewNoteDisabled = $derived(viewState.status === 'switching') only
RD-021 (blocks DTO field) and RD-022 (REQ-EDIT-038 dispatch-rejection surface) coherently added
REQ-EDIT-038 rewritten to specify Promise-rejection surface, currentBlockError local $state, contenteditable preserved
FIND-065 fixed: pendingNewNoteSource $state + $effect deferred dispatch on saving→editing-clean OR idle transition; cleared on save-failed
FIND-060/061 fixed: ghost block removed; comment confirms BlockElement handles all keyboard events on real rendered elements
FIND-067 fixed: $effect with document.activeElement guard to prevent re-focus duplicate dispatches; verified by new click-once-and-domain-echo test
FIND-069 fixed: replaced expect(result).toBeDefined() with concrete assertions on shouldFire and fireAt
REQ-EDIT-038 (RD-022): makeErrorSurfacingAdapter wraps 4 dispatch methods with rejection capture; clears on subsequent edit
FIND-060 fixed: ghost block element + handleGhostKeyDown + handleGhostInput + .ghost-block CSS removed entirely
FIND-062 fixed: validation hint rendered conditionally on currentBlockError?.blockId === block.id; no always-present hidden divs
FIND-068 fixed: IDLE_SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS removed from types.ts; canonical export only in debounceSchedule.ts
FIND-066 architectural fix: mirrorSnapshot accepts currentBlocks; mirrors snapshot.blocks when present, preserves prior state.blocks when absent (RD-021)
DtoBlock type added; optional blocks?: ReadonlyArray<DtoBlock> on all four non-idle DTO arms (RD-021)
FIND-063 fixed: EC-EDIT-014 test now emits post-Cancel editing snapshot and asserts document.activeElement?.getAttribute('data-block-id') === 'block-1'
FIND-064 fixed: data-shadow-applied tautology replaced with className regex + source-grep on SaveFailureBanner.svelte for 5-layer shadow + #dd5b00 literals
FIND-064 fixed: data-shadow-applied and data-accent-color attributes removed from banner root
FIND-067 fixed: REQ-EDIT-001 click-once test (calledTimes(1)) + new domain-echo test verifies $effect guard prevents duplicate dispatch
FIND-070 partial: Alt+Shift+Up/Down tests now assert specific toIndex values (block-2 up→0, block-1 down→1)
Pure-tier purity audit: zero forbidden-API hits
Pure-tier purity audit: zero forbidden-API hits; total reducer over EditorAction × EditingSessionStatus
Pure-tier purity audit: zero forbidden-API hits
bun run test:dom reports 216 passed (216); editor-scope tsc errors=0
REQ-EDIT-038 (RD-022): currentBlockError is local impure-shell $state; never enters EditorViewState or pure reducer; purity boundary preserved
